headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 30, 2026**
article:
The Chicago Cubs edged out the Arizona Diamondbacks 6-5 in a closely contested game, with Geraldo Perdomo leading the Diamondbacks' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. The Texas Rangers secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with Tyler Alexander earning the win and Jacob Latz notching the save. The Milwaukee Brewers secured a 6-1 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Jacob Misiorowski earning the win after 5.1 innings of scoreless relief.

Several key players have been placed on the injured list, impacting their teams' lineups and rotations. The Minnesota Twins placed right-hander Cole Sands on the 15-day injured list due to a right forearm strain, effective retroactive to April 29, 2026. The Seattle Mariners placed right-hander Matt Brash on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 30, 2026, due to right lat inflammation. The Baltimore Orioles placed right-hander Ryan Helsley on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 29, 2026, due to right elbow inflammation.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place, shaking up teams' lineups and rotations. The Detroit Tigers acquired infielder Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired second baseman Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash. The Toronto Blue Jays acquired catcher Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Cubs Take Down Diamondbacks in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs edged out the Arizona Diamondbacks 6-5 in a closely contested game. Geraldo Perdomo led the Diamondbacks' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rangers Edge Tigers in Thrilling 5-4 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Texas Rangers secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with Tyler Alexander earning the win and Jacob Latz notching the save.

top_news.title: **Reds Fall to Pirates in One-Sided Affair**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds suffered a 9-1 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with the Pirates dominating the game from start to finish. Henry Davis led the Pirates' offense with two home runs and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Brewers Take Down Nationals 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers secured a 6-1 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Jacob Misiorowski earning the win after 5.1 innings of scoreless relief. William Contreras led the Brewers' offense with 4 hits and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Twins RHP Cole Sands Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Minnesota Twins right-hander Cole Sands has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right forearm strain, effective retroactive to April 29, 2026.

top_news.title: **Tigers Acquire Zack Short in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have acquired infielder Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. Short joins the Tigers' roster, bringing his skills to the team.
